column9: 使用模特图和产品图替换第三张图片中的产品和人物脸部,只改变人物脸部和产品- 不要出现手机屏幕的照相框。- 严格按照产品的大小尺寸形状来生图 - 生成的图片中不要有字幕 - 服装与第三张图保持一致
column13:
{"timestamp":2.5,"guidance":"1)人物正脸清晰，红脸状态明显；2)手指脸部动作明确；3)光线均匀，能看清面部细节。⚠️ 建议换参考帧：选产品不清晰/不入镜的帧，或先把参考帧里的产品替换成商品参考图的产品，再用于I2V，否则模型容易沿用旧产品。"}Shot 1 (0:00–0:07). Visual: Close-up, eye-level selfie shot of the woman in a closet. Her face is exaggeratedly red and puffy (sunburn makeup effect). She is wearing a white robe and gold jewelry. She holds the product (purple concealer tube) in one hand and gestures stressfully at her red face with the other. Handheld camera movement, slightly shaky to mimic a distressed vibe. Lighting is bright indoor natural light. Keep the background of hanging clothes consistent.
Spoken dialogue (say EXACTLY, word-for-word): Imagine you passed out in the sun after 20,000 drinks, your face is swollen, red, looking like a total disaster.
Mouth clearly visible when speaking, lip-sync aligned with the spoken dialogue. Emphasize 20,000 drinks and total disaster with exasperated facial expressions.
The product must be EXACTLY the same as the product in the reference product images—same shape, size proportions, color, material, logo, packaging (if and only if visible in the reference), and readable text. Do not redesign, replace, relabel, or alter it in any way.
No additional product-related items are allowed beyond what is visible in the reference product images (no extra box, packaging, pouch, manual, tag, accessories, or new labels). Do not invent packaging.
所有产品细节完全以商品参考图为准，参考图没出现的包装/配件/标签一律禁止出现。镜头1 (0:00–0:07)。画面：特写，平视自拍视角，女性在衣帽间内。她的脸部呈现夸张的泛红和肿胀状态（晒伤妆效）。她身穿白色浴袍，佩戴金饰。她一手拿着产品（紫色遮瑕管），另一只手焦急地指着自己的红脸。手持镜头运动，轻微晃动以模拟焦躁的氛围。光线为明亮的室内自然光。保持背景挂衣物的一致性。
口播台词（逐字精准）：Imagine you passed out in the sun after 20,000 drinks, your face is swollen, red, looking like a total disaster.
说话时嘴部清晰可见，口型与台词同步。配合“20,000 drinks”和“total disaster”做出无奈夸张的表情。
产品必须与商品参考图完全一致——形状、比例、颜色、材质、Logo、包装（仅限参考图中可见的）和文字均需相同，不得重新设计或修改。
严禁出现商品参考图中未见的任何产品相关物品（无额外盒子、包装、袋子、说明书、吊牌、配件或新标签）。【有口播】【有商品】【触发建议换参考帧提醒】

Visual: Extreme Close-up of the cheek being blended. The woman uses the brush to buff the purple concealer into the skin. As she brushes, the red skin instantly transforms into a smooth, neutral beige tone (color correcting effect). Focus on the texture change from red/dry to smooth/blurred.
Spoken dialogue (say EXACTLY, word-for-word): It is basically a filter on your skin. It covers everything up, and it wont stick to any dry patches.

口播台词（逐字精准）：It is basically a filter on your skin. It covers everything up, and it wont stick to any dry patches.

The woman looks directly at the camera, posing confidently with flawless, even-toned skin (redness completely gone). She fixes her hair/bun and adjusts her robe collar. She turns her head slightly to show off the smooth skin texture.
Spoken dialogue (say EXACTLY, word-for-word): Look at this finish.
Mouth clearly visible when speaking, lip-sync aligned with the spoken dialogue. After speaking, she continues to pose and smile confidently.
No additional product-related items are allowed beyond what is visible in the reference product images.镜头7 (0:38–0:47)。画面：特写最终展示。女性直视镜头，自信摆拍，展示无瑕、肤色均匀的皮肤（泛红完全消失）。她整理头发/发髻并调整浴袍领口。她轻微转头以展示平滑的皮肤质感。
口播台词（逐字精准）：Look at this finish.
说话时嘴部清晰可见，口型与台词同步。
说完后，她继续自信地摆姿势微笑。

Shot数量是否与Shot表一致且按shot_id顺序？ 是 (Shot 1-7)。2. 每个Shot是否包含(1)(2)(3)(4)四块？ 是。3. 有口播Shot，是否逐字包含 Spoken dialogue (say EXACTLY...) 且台词原样粘贴？ 是 (Shot 1-7均检查无误)。4. 有口播Shot，是否包含 lip-sync aligned 描述？ 是。5. 有商品Shot，是否包含两条英文商品硬锁句？ 是 (Shot 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)。6. 是否禁止出现商品参考图没有的包装/配件/标签？ 是 (写入硬锁)。7. 中文核对版是否逐句对应英文提示词？ 是。8. 是否无编造硬信息？ 是 (仅描述视觉效果，无虚构数据)。

Spoken dialogue (say EXACTLY, word-for-word): “Good separately, but the combo is elite. Watch this.”
Mouth clearly visible when speaking, lip-sync aligned with the spoken dialogue. Emphasis on elite with a knowing smile.
Editing: Pacing is medium, transitioning into a quick transformation cut.
The shot ends with her leaning slightly forward toward the lens.
column31:
Visual: (0:14.5–16.0) Full-body shot, static. Instant transformation: the woman is now wearing the butter yellow cardigan tucked into the brown trousers. She stands confidently with one hand in her pocket, showing the base layer of the outfit. Keep lighting and overall look consistent with the reference frame.
No spoken dialogue. Keep motion subtle and editable.
The product must be EXACTLY the same as the product in the reference product images—same shape, color, and fit.
所有产品细节完全以商品参考图为准，参考图没出现的包装/配件/标签一律禁止出现。
The shot ends with her shifting her weight slightly for a more dynamic pose.
column34:
Visual: (16.0–21.0) Full-body shot, slight low-angle to emphasize stature. The woman has added the leather jacket over her shoulders and wears oversized sunglasses, holding a small brown handbag. She performs a slight lateral turn to show the bag and the contrast between the leather and knit textures. Gentle camera follow-movement. Keep lighting and overall look consistent with the reference frame.
Spoken dialogue (say EXACTLY, word-for-word): “Key is mixing textures. It looks so expensive.”
Mouth clearly visible when speaking, lip-sync aligned with the spoken dialogue.
The product must be EXACTLY the same as the product in the reference product images. No packaging allowed.
所有产品细节完全以商品参考图为准，参考图没出现的包装/配件/标签一律禁止出现。
The shot ends with her adjusting her sunglasses and smiling.
column37:
Visual: (21.0–25.0) Full-body shot, eye-level, static. The woman finishes adjusting her outfit, turns fully to face the camera, and holds a warm, bright smile as a final pose. The look is polished and complete. Keep lighting and overall look consistent with the reference frame.
Spoken dialogue (say EXACTLY, word-for-word): “You dont need new stuff, just fresh styling.”
Mouth clearly visible when speaking, lip-sync aligned with the spoken dialogue. The product must be EXACTLY the same as the product in the reference product images.
所有产品细节完全以商品参考图为准，参考图没出现的包装/配件/标签一律禁止出现。
Editing: Slow pacing, ending with a freeze-frame on her smile.
The shot ends with the woman standing still and radiating confidence.
